name: axon
description: Lean development methodology: 10 lifecycle skills plus workflow authoring.

interface.shortDescription: Lean dev methodology: dream/brainstorm → plan → implement/execute → review → finish
interface.longDescription: A focused development methodology plugin. 10 composable lifecycle skills cover dream (greenfield ideation), brainstorm (brownfield design), write-plan (bite-sized tasks), implement (subagent execution with two-stage review), execute (inline single-task execution), tdd (test-first), debug (systematic 4-phase), review (spec compliance + code quality), finish (clean branch completion), and verify (evidence before claims). create-hook adds docs-aware workflow authoring centered on the user's root-level workflow.md.
